title: [New] LinkedIn Ads Integration
excerpt:
Hello! 
I’m excited to share that you can now import data into monday from LinkedIn Ads using the Data Importer app. 
I’ve also made a step-by-step tutorial for this.

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’m excited to share that you can now import data into monday from LinkedIn Ads using the Data Importer app.

I’ve also made a step-by-step tutorial for this.

image2468×1158 164 KB

posts.author: LiselotteVD (Liselotte van Dijk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi James,

Is it only possible to automate LinkedIn Ads data or also organic data from LinkedIn posts?

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @LiselotteVD. Yes currently Data Importer only has an integration for ads data. I’m looking to add organic posts too at some point.
